Enjoy an endless catalog of free levels created by players like you, or try the ultra-simple level maker to create your own level and share it with your friends! Show off your creativity and become the best creator in the world!

name: Gothic Classic
summary:
For the first time, relive this amazing RPG on a handheld console and enjoy the game that revolutionized roleplaying games on the go. Dive into dark times and adventures with great performance and a well adapted UI and controls.

War has been waged across the kingdom of Myrtana. Orcish hordes invaded human territory and the king of the land needed a lot of ore to forge enough weapons, should his army stand against this threat. Whoever breaks the law in these darkest of times is sentenced to serve in the giant penal colony of Khorinis, mining the so much needed ore. You are thrown through the barrier into this prison colony. With your back against the wall, you have to survive and form volatile alliances until you can finally escape.

name: Residiuum: Tales of Coral
summary:
Explore a universe rich in personality and full of mysteries.

After the sun went mad and exploded, all that was left of the world was the Auric Earth. A region divided between the Elite with their suited men and their experiments and technologies with the multi-purpose gas Sig, and the less fortunate who must deal with gangs of criminals of various kinds and a hostile environment full of toxic and poisonous substances.

name: Gothic II: Complete Classic
summary:
Continue the story of the Nameless Hero in Gothic II: Complete Classic, the award-winning sequel that improved on its predecessor in every way. Experience it now for the first time on Nintendo Switch.

Gothic II: Complete Classic brings together the excitement of Gothic II and the add-on Night of the Raven to your fingertips for the first time on a console.

name: Disney Dreamlight Valley
summary: Explore a world filled with the magic of Disney as you discover rich stories and build the perfect neighbourhood alongside Disney and Pixar Heroes and Villains in this new life-sim adventure game. Welcome to Disney Dreamlight Valley.

name: Palworld
summary: Palworld is a multiplayer, open-world survival crafting game where you can befriend and collect mysterious creatures called "Pal" in a vast world! Make your Pals fight, build, farm, and work in factories.

name: ChildStory
summary: As a child, we all wondered: "Where does the Moon disappear every month?". This ChildStory will tell about Sonya, a girl in a purple Kigurumi, and the angry Heavenly shepherdess Nora. The two of them create the cycle of the appearance and the loss of the Moon.

name: Beast: Bio Exo Arena Suit Team
summary: Immerse yourself in the cosmic adventure of BEAST! A unique 3V3 online shooter designed for all ages. BEAST combines charm and excitement with intuitive controls.

name: Smalland: Survive the Wilds
summary: Experience a big adventure on a tiny scale! Enjoy multiplayer survival in a vast, hazardous world. Preparation is key when you're this small & at the bottom of the food chain. Craft weapons & armour, tame & ride creatures, build encampments & explore a strange new land.

name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors
summary: A port of the original PS Vita game, in English for the first time.

name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth
summary: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth is the second entry in the Final Fantasy VII remake project, which retells the story of the genre-redefining RPG across three distinct games. Iconic heroes Cloud, Barret, Tifa, Aerith and Red XIII have escaped from the dystopian city Midgar and are now in pursuit of Sephiroth, the vengeful swordsman from Cloud’s past who was thought to be dead.

name: Final Fantasy VII Rebirth: Digital Deluxe Edition
summary:
Content of the Digital Deluxe Edition:
・ Final Fantasy VII Rebirth main game
・ Digital art book
・ Digital mini soundtrack
・ Summon Materia: Magic Pot
・ Accessory: Reclaimant Choker
・ Armor: Orchid Bracelet

name: Content Warning
summary: Film your friends doing scary things to become SpöökTube famous!

name: Ereban: Shadow Legacy
summary: Ereban: Shadow Legacy is a fast-paced stealth platformer game where you become Ayana, the last descendant of a forgotten race. Harness mystical shadow powers, high-tech gadgets and avoid or kill to uncover the truth about your past and the key to saving a dying, morally grey universe.

name: Iftar for Two
summary: Iftar for Two is a very short kinetic novel made for Ramadan game Jam 2024. It features two former friends who decide to have iftar together and talk about bits about this and that.

name: Agent Simulator
summary: If you are a sharpshooter, you would be a great fit for us. Within a short period of time, select 3 options from the list and deal with your enemies. Do not forget that the ability of using time efficiently and aiming your targets are crucial. Complete each mission and earn an agent certification.

name: Solo Leveling: Arise
summary: Solo Leveling: Arise is an action RPG based on the South Korean web novel of the same name.

name: Doll Defenders
summary: You were teleported to Male Doll's multiverse with one goal: to save the heroes of our games. However, you may fall in love with them along the way and get the happy final ending you deserve. Are you looking to save the world, or the love of one hot man that’s everything you ever wanted? Don't lie!

name: Lorelei and the Laser Eyes
summary:
A woman, summoned by an eccentric man to participate in a project in an old hotel somewhere in central Europe, becomes embroiled in a game of illusions, increasingly dangerous and surreal.

Now you are invited to fall into the same rabbit hole, in a non-linear mystery with an immense amount of handcrafted puzzles, constantly presenting you with new riddles to solve, each leading you closer to deciphering the enigma of Lorelei and the Laser Eyes.

name: Soulmask
summary: Soulmask is a sandbox game that prioritizes an authentic survival experience. As the "last one" blessed with the mysterious mask, players will grapple for survival in a primitive land steeped in mysterious faiths, carving out a path to ascendance. Start from nothing, explore, build, recruit tribesmen to fortify your clan, and ultimately unravel the mysterious truths hidden behind the civilizations of this world.

name: Kristala
summary:
Kristala is a dark fantasy ARPG featuring Sekiro-inspired combat, acrobatic parkour, and exploration to uncover a detailed story. Embark on a journey to join ranks with Ailur’s most elite warriors as you battle to master the ancient magic of the Sacred Six and uncover the source of a dark curse.

Play as a catlike warrior from one of six clans, each with its own unique magic specialty. Choose your own style of combat: avoid damage by blocking, dashing/rolling, and deflecting attacks; combo light and heavy attacks; utilize multiple weapon abilities; and cast numerous spells.

Your catlike character will be fully customizable via various Talent Trees, including an innovative Feline Skill tree that allows you to unlock and level a multitude of feline-related skills.

name: Go-Go Town!
summary: Thank god you’re here Mayor - you’ve got lots of work to do! In this city building sim, you’re responsible for the layout, logistics optimisation, population growth - all whilst navigating the everyday chaos of infrastructure, worker management and dynamic challenges to make your dream town.

name: Aarik: and the Ruined Kingdom
summary: Aarik (and the ruined kingdom) is a perspective based puzzle game centred around a Prince trying desperately to repair his father's kingdom. Using a magical crown Aarik must grab, roll, move and mend to save his homeland and his family.

name: Baradroid: A Gay Visual Novel
summary: A choice-driven, high-tech, gay visual novel with elements of dating-sim! Choose your baradroid, Live with him, and... Can you teach a robot the meaning of human love?

name: S&box
summary: S&box is a next-generation sandbox platform that lets players instantly play community-made games while creators build limitless experiences using a powerful modern engine. From rapid prototyping to full multiplayer games, everything lives in one connected ecosystem.

name: Wilder World: Super Early Access
summary: Interdimensional refugees known as the Wilders flee Our Base Reality, which has become an AI-controlled dystopia to Wiami, a digital sanctuary in Wilder World. When the authoritarian FORUM attempts to conquer Wiami, the Wilders strategize a defence.

name: Fields of Mistria
summary: Start your new life! Build the farm of your dreams as you discover a world brimming with possibilities. Magic, romance, and adventure all await you in this nostalgic farming / life sim RPG!

name: Shapez 2
summary: Dive into a factory-building game where the focus is on just that — building huge factories! Construct sprawling multi-level factories and min-max your layouts without limits. Shapez 2 is tailor-made for enthusiasts who crave the thrill of optimizing production lines and perfecting automation.

name: Under the Red Sky
summary: Under The Red Sky is a 3D parkour game where speed is king! Your goal is to get to the end of each level as quick as possible by taking one of the many different routes possible, or by finding your own. Watch out though, this isn't all fun and games. You may accidentally fall into the past and uncover what happened and how to get back above. You may find that you're now Under the Red Sky.

name: TCG Card Shop Simulator
summary:
Open your own local game store. Stock shelves with the latest booster packs, or crack them and collect the cards for yourself. Set your own prices, hire staff, host events, and expand your card shop.

TCG Card Shop Simulator is a trading card shop simulation where you sell card booster packs to earn money and build your card shop business.

name: The Tag-along Obsession
summary: The Tag-along Obsession is adapted from the movie "The Tag-along", based on the Urban Legend. It is a first-person horror puzzle adventure game, Players will play Hui-Ting and go into the situation to understand a series of supernatural phenomenon, and immerse themselves in the story, looking for the answers to everything.

name: Realm of Ink
summary: Realm of Ink is an Ink-style action Roguelite game. You, the heroine unexpectedly discover that you are just a fictional character within the short story collection Realm of Ink when hunting the Fox. Only by defeating the mysterious Book Spirit can you be liberated from the realm.

name: Alien Agent X
summary: Players can obtain materials and exchange them for corresponding characters, costumes, weapons, actions, etc. Supports body adjustment, taking photos, scene scanning, player chain connection.All multiplayer online. Currently in the early access most Unreal the scene will be changed later.

name: Kinki Spiritual Affairs Bureau
summary: Time to fight back against the spirits! Play as an exorcist with firearms and purge unlawful spirits to solve the mystery of the Saiga village invasion in Nara!

name: Mourning Tide
summary: Mourning Tide is a first-person fishing horror game. A guilt-ridden fisherman ventures into unknown waters. Each catch reveals haunting reminders of his past sins. Unravel the mystery and seek redemption, or be consumed by the mourning tide...

name: Portrait of a Torn
summary: As a young soldier returning to an eerily deserted home, you'll explore enigmatic rooms, solve intricate puzzles, and uncover a haunting, tragic story.

name: Scramble: Battle of Britain
summary:
Scramble: Battle of Britain is a simultaneous turn-based dogfighting game. Set in a 3D airspace, the game features fast-paced, tactical combat with dynamic flight physics.
Luftwaffe and RAF fighter squadrons go head to head over The English Channel. Competing players simultaneously issue control inputs for multiple aircraft while time is paused.
The planned orders are then played out simultaneously: shots are fired, loops are looped, colliding planes collide.

name: Homicipher
summary: Homicipher is an adventure horror game where you’ll decipher a language, fall in love and escape. Players will face various horrifying men in this strange world. Your aim is to decipher their language and eventually find a way to escape. Meanwhile, a peculiar feeling also starts to bloom.

name: Unrailed 2: Back on Track
summary: Unrailed is back on track with more co-op railroad construction chaos! Choose your path in a new world packed with bold biomes and bosses. Permanently upgrade your character and engines, even create and share your own levels - just don‘t let your train derail!

name: Temtem: Swarm
summary: A survivor-like bullet heaven with online co-op up to 3 players

name: Incantation
summary: "Incantation" is a first-person horror mystery game adapted from a movie of the same name. The game reveals the chilling story behind "Chen Village" from the movie. A mother searching for her missing daughter accidentally stumbles into a village filled with mysterious cults. Beyond the palpable madness and fear in the village, there's a sinister force that drives one to despair. What happens when one crosses the forbidden line of this evil deity?

name: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
summary: Pursue your dream of an aviation career with Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024. This brand-new simulator is designed to take advantage of the latest technologies in simulation, cloud, machine learning, graphics and gaming to create the most sophisticated, immersive and awe-inspiring flight simulator of all time. To achieve this unprecedented level of accuracy, Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 is powered by the significantly evolved Asobo Studio engine.

name: Mado Monogatari: Fia and the Wondrous Academy
summary:
An ancient school of sorcery. Where students study true magic and cultivate their ambitions.

Fia, a girl who aims to be a great sorcerer, leaves her hometown and enrolls in an ancient school of sorcery once attended by her grandmother in order to study sorcery.

Surrounded by strict but humorous instructors, and chaotic but amusing classmates, Fia will study sorcery and develop her abilities.

name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle
summary: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in Indiana Jones and the Great Circle, a first-person, single-player adventure set between the events of Raiders of the Lost Ark and The Last Crusade. You’ll become the legendary archaeologist in this cinematic action-adventure game from MachineGames, the award-winning studio behind the recent Wolfenstein series, and executive produced by Hall of Fame game designer Todd Howard.

name: Path of Mystery: A Brush with Death
summary:
A completely new title from Imagineer and Toybox Inc., Mystery Walk is the first in a three-part serial drama series!

The game is set in Narumisawa, a charming, fictional summer getaway town that feels familiar, as though you have seen it somewhere before…

The story alternates between the present and the past to uncover the truth behind an unsolved case from 30 years ago.

Told through a prologue, 10 episodes, and a mysterious “?” episode, the mysteries deepen with each chapter.

The fully voiced dialogue, brought to life by a talented cast, will make you eager to continue to the next episode. And there are some unexpected names among the voice actors…

Please immerse yourself in the world of Mystery Walk to the fullest!

name: Miniature Land: Four Seasons
summary: An escape room game made by hand-building and photographing miniature scenes. Explore a miniature world in live-action and enjoy feeling like you're really there.

name: Sottaku
summary: Sottaku is a multiplayer video game in which players compete against each other, Geoguessr-style, in order to quickly read or fill in the blanks in cloze or reading sentences, across Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.

name: Once Upon a Dungeon: Infinity
summary: Travel through dark dungeons, defeat dangerous creatures, and collect unique loot as you play endlessly in this hardcore, traditional roguelike.

name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Hero of Justice Pack
summary:
DRAGON BALL: Sparking! ZERO HERO OF JUSTICE Pack contains the following contents from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie.

- 11 Playable Characters:
• Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan, Superhero Super Saiyan
• Ultimate Gohan, Superhero
• Gohan Beast
• Piccolo, Superhero
• Piccolo, Potential Unleashed
• Orange Piccolo
• Orange Piccolo, Giant Form
• Gamma 1
• Gamma 2
• Cell Max

- New Costume:
• Piccolo, Superhero
This is the costume Piccolo wears when infiltrating the Red Ribbon Army base in Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO.

- 3 Bonus Battles

Experience the intense battles from the Dragon Ball SUPER: SUPER HERO movie in custom battles, including the fierce fight between Piccolo and Gamma 2, the epic showdown between Gohan and Gamma 1, and the thrilling battle where Gohan and Piccolo face off against Cell Max.

name: Possessions
summary: In Possessions, perspective changes everything. Solve mesmerizing puzzles by shifting your view and bending reality to your will. Explore a minimalist 3D world filled with illusionary surprises, and uncover a quiet story of connection and family as you progress.

name: Bulbo's Belief System
summary:
Bulbo's Belief System is a puzzle-platformer where knowledge is both a tool and an obstacle. Bulbo believes everything he's told—learning allows him to see, move, and interact, but forgetting is just as important.

Erase walls from existence, ignore gravity to walk across gaps, and manage conflicting beliefs to solve mind-bending challenges. Experiment with what Bulbo knows (or doesn't) to navigate a world where perception shapes reality.

Can you control what Bulbo learns and unlearns to reach the goal?

name: Detective VR
summary: Step into a thrilling narrative investigation in Virtual Reality! In DETECTIVE VR, you control time, collect crucial clues, and interview witnesses to unravel the plot.

name: Evocreo II
summary:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

name: Grimoire Groves
summary: Restore the magical forest as you grow cute plant creatures with your witch magic in this cozy rogue-lite dungeon crawler. Unlock all spells, discover new plant types, befriend magical creatures, and unravel the mystery of the rainbow socks.

name: Nubby's Number Factory
summary: A plinko-style roguelike where you work at a number factory. Launch your spherical friend, Nubby, down a pegboard to make bigger and bigger numbers! But beware, if you fail to meet your number quota, the sun will explode.

name: Eternal Fate: A Journey Begins
summary: Old-school style RPG to enjoy a nostalgic tale with difficult and fair gameplay that is fully voiced.

name: Peppered: An Existential Platformer
summary:
A light hearted 2D platformer about the meaningless of existence. Dark humour. Big focus on narrative-driven gameplay. Regret. Currently being developed for PC and Mac.
You play as a nameless civilian of an immortal world an hour before a return of the God of death. Life presents you with an opportunity to take this matter into your own hands. And then presents you with countless ways to fail spectacularly.

name: CloserLook VR: Oldways
summary: CLoserLook: Old Ways, a captivating interactive story VR adventure game set in modern day west Africa. Awakening in a locked university administrative building, you'll need to solve a series of intricate puzzles to find your way out. As you navigate through the game, explore secret locations and uncover a gripping narrative that delves into themes of exploitation, corruption, and betrayal.

name: South of Midnight
summary: South of Midnight is a new action-adventure from Compulsion Games. Explore the mythos and confront mysterious creatures of the Deep South in this modern folktale while learning to weave an ancient power to surmount obstacles and face the pain haunting your hometown.

name: Hollywood Animal
summary: Make your dreams come true — or crush someone else’s. Take the helm of a major Hollywood studio at the dawn of sound cinema, and guide it through decades of creative achievements and glamor, debauchery and dark deeds, tough choices and unpleasant compromises.

name: Jammer Dash
summary: Jammer Dash is a free rhythm 2D game in which you move and destroy objects on beat made for Windows and Linux! Inspired by many awesome games such as Muse Dash, Geometry Dash and osu!. Made in Unity and C#.

name: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero - Dragon Ball Daima: Character Pack 1
summary:
New warriors from the Dragon Ball DAIMA anime series join the battle!

- 8 Playable Characters:
• Goku (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini)
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 2
• Vegeta (Mini), Super Saiyan 3
• Glorio
• Panzy
• Majin Kuu

‐ Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit
• New costume for Goku (Mini) that changes his moves

Get the Dragon Ball DAIMA: Character Pack 1 and enjoy new battles!

*Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit is different from Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini).
*Ownership of Pre-Order Pack Goku (Mini) is not required.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will not alter his appearance.
*Equipping the Goku (Mini) Technique-changing Outfit costume on Goku (Mini) will transform his Ultimate Blast into Aura Impact.

name: The Boba Teashop
summary: A cozy horror game where you own and manage a boba tea shop. Prepare boba teas, serve customers, and expand your menu to grow your business.

name: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered
summary: Explore Cyrodiil like never before with stunning new visuals and refined gameplay in The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered.

name: Deck of Haunts
summary: Deck of Haunts invites you to become a malevolent Haunted House. Lure humans into your cursed halls, manipulate their fears, and drain their essence to grow your power. Use strategy to build your mansion and expand your dark influence, turning your home into a terrifying, inescapable nightmare.

name: The Midnight Walk
summary:
Embark upon The Midnight Walk in this reverent dark fantasy adventure built in clay, from the minds behind Lost in Random and Fe.

Become The Burnt One, befriend a lost lantern creature named Potboy, and use his flame to light your way through a conflicting world of wonder and horror. Survive and outsmart the many monsters eager to devour your little friend’s flame as you experience five tales of fire and darkness, featuring an incredible cast of odd characters.

Marvel at every disturbing detail in a landscape painstakingly handcrafted with real life clay and animated in a stop motion style. Fully playable in both flatscreen and with a VR headset.

name: Frog Legs
summary: A short, single-player horror action game starring Carl, the suburban house frog. Will you be able to conquer arcade challenges, solve puzzles, and Ribbit and Tear your way back to the life you once knew?

name: Volontés
summary: Volontés is an Dark Fantasy × Suspense otome game in which the main character, who has lost everything, finds her way of life while facing tragedy.

name: Ys Memoire: Revelations in Celceta
summary:
Experience a timeless chapter in the storied RPG franchise making its debut on Nintendo Switch, filled with duplicitous schemes, treacherous geography, and secretive characters.

As Adol Christin, search for clues to your past in an epic adventure, making use of strategic combat, and exploring a dangerous world to a newly rearranged OST.

name: Sol Cesto
summary: Sol Cesto is a tactical and frenetic roguelite in which you have to master your luck. Choose a hero and reach the bottom of a random dungeon. In this grim world, every action has consequences...

name: Automate It
summary: Automate It is a factory building game that requires clever solutions to its size, power, and time constraints. Solve challenges, build and share your own levels, or open things up in sandbox mode. If you want to build it - Automate It.

name: Trash Goblin
summary: A cosy and moreish fantasy shop sim where you uncover, clean, upcycle and sell a vast variety of trinkets - both invaluable and unlovable - to a diverse cast of fascinating customers across a colourful fantasy city. Think Potionomics meets PowerWash Simulator, with a unique protagonist!

name: Saeko: Giantess Dating Sim
summary: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you. Experience the fate of Saeko and the little people in this cruel yet captivating story with avant-garde art.

name: Clover Reset
summary: "Hey, do you know the meaning of the four-leaf clover?" Set at "Shonan Saika Academy," a prestigious school in Shonan, Kanagawa Prefecture, this is a youthful story of girls wavering between friendship and love.

name: Dragon Is Dead
summary: Dragon is Dead is a hack-and-slash, roguelite action platformer. It offers tons of customization fun with different character skill trees and legendary equipment. Overcome repeated deaths to defeat Guernian, the leader of the Dark Dragons.

name: Calamity Angels: Special Delivery
summary: A rag-tag group of kooky carriers protect and trek packages through treacherous terrains in this delivery service RPG!

name: Dragon Ball Sparking Zero: Shallot (Dragon Ball Legends)
summary: Shallot from the mobile game DRAGON BALL LEGENDS joins the battle!

name: Self Simulated
summary: Self Simulated is a fast-paced precision platformer for the Game Boy Color. Play as a robotic version of yourself and navigate over 100 handcrafted levels filled with enemies, hazards, and glitch-filled dangers. Uncover your past and master tight, responsive controls designed for fast retries and fluid movement.

name: Spirit Crossing
summary: Spirit Crossing is a beautiful cooperative life-sim about building friendships and community. Sign up for our Closed Alpha playtest and discover a world where you can connect, escape, and belong.

name: Back to the Dawn
summary:
A gripping prison escape RPG woven with crime, corruption, and hidden agendas. Step into a maximum-security facility where every inmate has a past—and a plan. You'll have to fight to survive, investigate, and ultimately break free before the time runs out.

Uncover a scheme that threatens more than just your life—it could bring down the entire city. In this thrilling adventure, choices matter, and escape is your only salvation!

name: Magical Girl Witch Trials
summary: Thirteen girls awaken, only to find themselves in a prison. What awaits them: a Witch Trial. Help them prepare for the trial by exploring the prison in order to find the witch hidden amongst them. Find the witch, learn what kind of magic she holds, dispel the lies, and prepare for the execution.

name: Mystic Explorer
summary: Mystic Explorer is a treasure rogue game. Players will play the role of treasure hunter in search of treasure chests in the siege of monsters, defeat the ever stronger enemies, and bring back your own archive treasures.

name: Primal Planet
summary: Unveil a heartfelt story of family, dinosaurs, and UFOs! Craft, upgrade, and survive in a realm of primeval predators, savage tribes and... ancient aliens. Rise from a humble cave dweller to the planet’s last hope — alone or in local co-op. Welcome to the dinovania!

name: Earthion
summary:
Earthion is an upcoming aftermarket shooting game developed by Ancient primarily for the Sega Mega Drive. Physical MD versions will be published by SUPERDELUXE GAMES in Japan and by Limited Run Games in North America. The game will also get a 16:9 version for modern platforms.

Earthion is published under the label YKGGG, a brand name covering all the retro-style games developed at Ancient. If Earthion meets success, Ancient will go on the venture of releasing video games designed for retro consoles. A separate version of the game for Arcade was confirmed by Ancient and published by exA-Arcadia, which features a new, exclusive mode that will not be available in the Mega Drive version.

name: PhotoLoop
summary: PhotoLoop is a casual game about editing photos using an outdated editing software that only has the lasso tool. Make sure to make your edits clean and concise, or you might not be able to pay your rent due in five days!

name: Tiny Bookshop
summary: Leave everything behind and open a Tiny Bookshop by the sea in this ambient narrative management game. Stock your wagon, set up shop in scenic locations, and navigate a post-capitalist future alongside Bookstonbury’s eclectic cast of characters.

name: Out and About
summary: You've come to help your Granny after a terrible storm destroyed her cottage and wreaked havoc in her idyllic coastal town. Can you find a way of restoring her home and uniting the townsfolk? Connect with nature by foraging, gardening, and cooking, then try out your new skills in the real world!

name: Off
summary: “I’m the Batter. I’ve been entrusted with a sacred mission.” -- One of the most influential RPGs of the last 20 years is finally coming to Steam and Nintendo Switch. Take control of the Batter as he seeks to purify an uncanny and hopeless world haunted by specters, guided by a cryptic, grinning cat called The Judge.

name: Void/Breaker
summary: VOID/BREAKER is an Adrenaline-Fueled Roguelite FPS. Fight relentless machines driven by a hostile AI. Escape an endless cycle. Craft infinite weapon variants with deep gun modding. Forge deadly synergies. Carve your way out through environmental destruction/BREAK THE SYSTEM /BREAK THE SEQUENCE /BREAK FREE

name: Ariana and the Elder Codex
summary:
The Librarian Ariana’s mission is to repair the Seven Hero Codices, which have been altered. Due to the terrible damages, magic has vanished from the world.

By utilizing special Librarian magic that allows her to enter Codices, Ariana seeks to mend the books to bring back magic. Can Ariana safely repair each tome and unravel the mysteries hidden within the Library?

name: Moonlight In Garland
summary: A chill open-ended life sim about finding your feet, making a positive impact and enjoying the journey in the big city. Find an apartment, make friends, grow plants and love your city life!

name: Whisper of the House
summary: What's happening in this seemingly peaceful town? Strange residents, bizarre incidents, and unexpected storylines! Please be sure to let go of all your human lifestyle preferences and strive to meet the special requests of your otherworldly employers. Decorate this house with peculiar furniture!

name: TriggerHeart Exelica Enhanced
summary: "Pull the trigger of your heart once again with new friends!"

name: Chark
summary: CHARK is a chess roguelike about risk, synergies, and precise calculation.

name: Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants
summary: There is a myth of a beast in the hidden depths of Rome, rumored to guard a terrible secret. Indiana Jones and the Great Circle: The Order of Giants DLC is an all-new story chapter that takes Indiana Jones to the ancient streets of Rome where forgotten catacombs twist into something far more sinister. Indy must outwit a dangerous cult and decipher intricate puzzles designed by emperors to uncover the dark legacy of the Nephilim giants.

name: Starvault
summary:
Choose your hero. Squad up. Push lanes. Farm creeps. Clear jungle camps. Upgrade your abilities mid-match. And dominate the map in intense 5v5 team fights.
Classic MOBA with stunning visuals that push the Meta Quest to its absolute limits.

name: Little Witch in the Woods
summary: Little Witch in the Woods tells the story of Ellie, an apprentice witch. Explore the mystical forest, help the charming residents, and experience the daily life of the witch.

name: Letters to Arralla
summary: Deliver letters, parcels, and packages to the residents of Arralla, a small fictional island off the coast of Australia populated by big booty cutie fruits! In this relaxing RPG, you play as a mail delivery turnip covering the holiday of the previous mailman. It’s your job to get the mail where it needs to go by solving visual puzzles and exploring.

name: My Little Coffee Shop
summary: Open the doors of your own coffee shop and immerse yourself in the world of fragrant coffee! In My Little Coffee Shop, you will have to: prepare different types of coffee and desserts; serve customers and fulfill their orders; decorate and improve the interior of your coffee shop; expand your business and discover new opportunities. Create the most cozy place in the city where everyone will find their favorite drink.

name: Ratatan
summary: Ratata Arts and TVT have announced Ratatan, a new rhythm action game from the creator of Patapon previously teased as Project JabberWocky.

name: Easy Delivery Co.
summary: Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game with strange secrets. Chill out, make deliveries and get to know the mysterious residents of this scenic mountain town, all while earning well below minimum wage.

name: Scribed Castle
summary: Scribed castle is a city builder where you scribe whimsical towns, cozy villages, and gothic cathedrals in the medieval illustration art style.

name: Tiny Archer
summary: Embark on an epic adventure in Tiny Archer, a breathtaking 2D platformer set in a dangerous, slime-infested dungeon! As a nimble archer, fight through 20 treacherous levels filled with cunning slimes, each requiring clever tactics to defeat. Master wall-jumping to navigate deadly traps, collect crystals, and grab powerful quivers that unleash triple-shot barrages of devastating power. With precise controls and diverse enemies, Tiny Archer offers thrilling combat and exploration.

name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger
summary: The latest in the Digimon Story series is finally here! In this RPG, unravel a mystery that spans across the human world and the Digital World, collecting and raising a wide variety of Digimon to save the world.

name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Costume Chosen Children Set
summary:
Grants Costume Chosen Children Set usable in Digimon Story Time Stranger. Additionally, a side mission related to the costumes will be unlocked.

Costume Chosen Children Set includes:
• Protagonist (Dan Yuki) Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Protagonist (Kanan Yuki) Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Inori Misono Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Aegiomon Costume Chosen Children Outfit
• Side Mission: The Targeted Cosplayer

name: Bleu Bayou
summary: A lonesome crawdad sets out to destroy the bayou’s vicious syndicate of loan sharks and robber barons—and erase his debts once and for all.

name: Starbites
summary: The story of a girl's growth and adventure on a vast desert planet, "Bitter."

name: A Recipe for Survival
summary: Use two decks of cards to serve food to your customers during the day! Then fight them off when they turn to monsters at night in this fun and unique deckbuilding roguelike!

name: Escape the Backrooms
summary: Explore the seemingly infinite expanse of eerily familiar levels in the backrooms based on the popular creepypasta lore. Each level features different ways to escape with danger along the way.

name: Psycasso
summary:
Take on the role of a serial killer who creates paintings with their victims blood! Sell your creations to earn money while trying to avoid capture by the police and other civilians.

In this pixel art adventure you'll play as Psycasso, a struggling gallery artist living in an open world city. By day you'll work a day job to earn money and level up skills, seamlessly blending into society. By night you'll be on the lookout to harvest 'red paint' from one of the 'walking meat-bags' to help you create original 2D art. Sell your artwork to art galleries for huge profits! Become rich from your unique artwork while avoiding capture from the ever growing police presence using stealth techniques and unique traps. Buy property, upgrades, furniture, weapons, discover a bustling city and play a host of mini games in this controversial indie title like nothing before.

name: Microvania
summary: Explore a tiny world, find upgrades, discover hidden paths, and battle bosses in this retro-style metroidvania action platformer.

name: Mannequin Mayhem: Physics Ragdoll Shooter
summary: Get ready for a wild ride in "Mannequin Mayhem," the craziest shooter this year! Say goodbye to zombies and aliens; it's time to blast creepy mannequins. Survive endless waves, customize your arsenal, and embrace the chaos. Let's laugh and blast our way through the weirdest enemies ever!

name: Motionrec
summary:
Motionrec is an action game that progresses through stages by recording and replaying the trajectory of your movements. Using MotionRec, you aim to clear stages quickly by recording and replaying your unique motions.

MotionRec is a gear that allows you to record, replay, and reverse-play your own movements. Customize it to your original specifications and strive for the fastest performance.

name: Through Blood and Dragons: Dragon Wars
summary: Through Blood and Dragons: Dragon Wars is a third-person, fantasy-themed, on-rails shooter for a single player; players take the role of an archer on the back of a dragon AND the dragon itself through short first-person dragon-breath segments.

name: The Alley
summary: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore a maze-like Korean alley, photograph and identify supernatural 'Demon Traces' from realistic illusions, and escape while evading a relentless ghost.

name: Majogami
summary: The sword fighter Shiroha cleaves through a twisted world with her high-speed Setsuna, facing off against the powerful witches in her way, in 2D paper craft character action. Paper craft character action! Majogami - the story of one girl who cuts gods like paper.

name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage
summary:
Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage takes the gameplay of Virtua Fighter 5 to new heights:

Rollback Netcode and Cross-play support let you take on any challenger, anywhere, across the globe in the most intense battles yet.

A brand-new single-player mode, ""World Stage"": Challenge powerful rivals on a solo quest to become the ultimate fighter

Enhanced replay functionality and improved training tools.

name: Final Formation
summary: Equipped with the Fusion × Transformation “PELL” System! Free Map Side-Scrolling Shooter

name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage: Legendary Pack
summary:
Get a blast from the past with customization items, characters models, stages and music straight out of the ground breaking original Virtua Fighter.

・Character customization items (around 2,000 types）
・Original Virtua Fighter character models (38 total)*
• Character Costumes (19 total)
・Original Virtua Fighter stages**
・Original Virtua Fighter battle UI*
・Virtua Fighter series music (180 tracks）
・Spectator stamps (36 total）

name: Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage: Yakuza Series Collaboration Pack
summary: Crank up the heat gauge with stylish character costumes and electrifying music from the Yakuza / Like a Dragon series. Dive deeper with even more character costumes, customization items, additional stamps, and newly arranged music from Virtua Fighter 3 to keep the adrenaline high.

name: Syrup 2: Candy Alchemy RPG
summary: SYRUP 2: CANDY ALCHEMY RPG is a direct sequel to Syrup and the Ultimate Sweet. As the title implies, the series has evolved into a fully featured RPG! Synthesize candies, battle monsters, and complete quests while discovering more about the world beyond Atelier Sweets!

name: Devil Jam
summary: Rampage through hell’s metal artists and their countless followers! Immerse yourself in a hand-animated, survivor-like experience that blends beat-driven combat with a unique 12-slot inventory system, allowing for near-infinite demonic builds.

name: Ages of Cataria
summary: Care for generations of townsfolk in a land of mystique and wonder. Build colonies along side your friends in this multiplayer colony sim and narrative RPG.

name: My Little Puppy
summary: "There is a saying that when you depart from this world, the dog who went ahead will warmly welcome you." While spending time in dog heaven, Bong-gu the Welsh Corgi suddenly catches his dad's scent. Now, he embarks on a journey to meet his dad. Will Bong-gu be able to see his dad again?

name: Anima Gate of Memories: I & II Remaster
summary: A third-person action RPG that brings to life the world of Gaia from the Anima: Beyond Fantasy RPG table-top books. Explore a deep and multifaceted story where your choices and actions directly impact the journey and decide the fate of the characters.

name: Rabbit Samurai
summary: In Rabbit Samurai, you’ll join a colorful 2D deck-building adventure. Each fight is tougher and funnier than the last.

name: Unmourned
summary: Unmourned is a first person psychological horror game where you play as Jason, a man who moves into a new house only to be haunted by escalating paranormal activities. As the disturbances grow more intense, Jason discovers that the house's previous owners mysteriously vanished. Driven by terror and desperation, Jason must uncover the truth behind the family’s disappearance and find a way to break the curse that now haunts him. Can he solve the mystery before it's too late?

name: Birdcage
summary: Shoot, Slash and Weave through bullets and enemies in this story-driven arcade shooter. Two giant fleets converge over the surface of the Earth. Pilot the HALCYON to prevent all-out war and the destruction of your Home. What is the value of a bullet when you wield a Sword?

name: Birdcage
summary:
BIRDCAGE is an arcade-style vertical scrolling shoot’em up inspired by genre classics, blending gritty pixel art sprites with 2.5D backdrops and a pumping retro soundtrack! Blast through 6 unique stages of bullet hell mayhem, facing off against enemy swarms using multiple shot types and rechargeable specials.

Chase high scores by maintaining chains and kill rate. Strategically activate Hyperblade mode in tense situations, and take down screen-filling bosses! Can you break free of your cage and redeem humanity?

name: Moonlighter 2: The Endless Vault
summary: Live the double life of a fearless adventurer and a crafty merchant! Dive into vibrant dimensions brimming with shiny loot and pesky enemies. Grow your shop, tinker with weapons and gadgets, as well as make your mark among a ragtag community of castaways.

name: Cleared Hot
summary: CLEARED HOT is a nostalgic helicopter shooter with satisfying physics and light tactical elements. Shoot, dodge, move your squad around the battlefield, and pick up almost anything with your rope and magnet.

name: Leaks In Space
summary: Build your own Spaceship, Mine, Trade, Craft, Explore & Survive! Leaks in Space is a 2D space-sim sandbox where you pilot a pressurized ship, battle and destroy pirate's ship part by part, while managing your own ship's integrity and fatal leaks.

name: Constance
summary: Constance is a 2D hand-drawn action adventure featuring a paintbrush-wielding artist, striving to escape from a colorful but decaying inner-world, created by her declining mental health.

name: Solo Leveling: Arise Overdrive
summary:
The Solo Leveling webtoon is now an action RPG!
Live the epic journey of E-Rank hunter Sung Jinwoo on his way to becoming the Monarch of Shadows!

name: Last Gasp
summary:
Whatever you do, do not give up.

Create a party on the fly and engage in Turn-Based JRPG Combat. Awakening in the world of Limbo, the Wanderer must take hold of their inspirations to escape. Limbo constantly changes and ideas will flow. You will have to work with what you're given and improvise your strategy.

name: Bubble Bobble: Sugar Dungeons
summary: Adventure again and again! Get stronger! The first step-up Bubble Bobble in the series! Go on an adventure through strange dungeons that change every time you step inside!

name: Two Point Museum: Zooseum
summary: Now hiring for Wildlife Experts to heal, raise and re-wild some wonderful wildlife in our brand new museum location!

name: Drop Duchy: Complete Edition
summary: Drop Duchy: Complete Edition includes all additional content released so far (“The Tribe” and “The North” DLCs) bringing the full strategic experience to console players! In a charming, maquette-inspired medieval world, Drop Duchy blends deckbuilding, puzzle mechanics, and roguelite progression into one seamless, strategic experience.

name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Episode Pack 1: Alternate Dimension
summary: In this Digimon Story Time Stranger DLC, five new digivolution paths for Mega Digimon are unlocked, granting players a special story woven from encounters that transcend time and space separately from the main storyline.

name: Bluey's Quest for the Gold Pen
summary: Join Bluey on a fun-filled quest for the Gold Pen in an original story by Bluey creator, Joe Brumm. A joyful experience for the whole family.

name: Pardon My French Toast
summary:
In Pardon My French Toast, you play as a Toasty (a talking slice of brioche) who dreams of participating in the new edition of the bread wrestling competition. To be physically up to the challenge, he decides to follow a training program organized by the previous champion of the discipline, which will take him all over the world and make him meet a bunch of wacky weirdos.

Pardon My French Toast is an adventure / platform game in 2D top view in which the player explores different worlds, solves puzzles and meets a whole bunch of fun characters. Bread wrestling is a... special sport. We will introduce the discipline later.

name: Heavy Duty
summary: Heavy Duty isn’t just about driving. It’s about controlling the toughest machines on Earth and leading a crew through high-stakes missions. Pick your cargo carefully, balance every load, and be ready to drop, crack, break, and try again until the job gets done.

name: Puzkin: Magnetic Odyssey
summary: PUZKIN: Magnetic Odyssey invites players to explore a vibrant, magical world where magnetic energy sustains the balance of nature and creatures called Puzzies. Players, embodying chosen children, are transported to this mysterious realm to restore its harmony through epic adventures, collaborative construction, and immersive quests.

name: Ghetto Zombies: Graffiti Squad
summary: Expect blasts of green zombie goo painting the screen in this top-down shooter packed with crazy guns that blow the heads off some… freaky zombies. Your mission is simple: graffiti the whole city before these mutants dog-pile you.

name: Umbra Lumen
summary: Roguelike Deckbuilder meets puzzle gameplay. Collect tarot cards and mystic items as you face unpredictable events, meet memorable characters, and explore the beyond life. Each run is different, and every decision matters. Will you ascend or fall in this unique turn-based RPG?

name: Bomboban
summary: Bomboban is a classic Sokoban-style puzzle game with an explosive twist: instead of pushing crates, you push enemy robots into bombs to defeat them and clear each stag

name: TR-49
summary: Narrative deduction meets audio drama, from the creators of Heaven’s Vault, Overboard! and A Highland Song.

name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Additional Digimon & Episode Pack 2: Gaku-Ran
summary: In this Digimon Story Time Stranger DLC, five new digivolution paths for Mega Digimon are unlocked, granting players a special story woven from encounters that transcend time and space separately from the main storyline.

name: Game With Balls
summary: Game With Balls! Move the Steam Deck to navigate through handcrafted mazes.

name: Journey to the Void
summary: Prepare to fend off attacks from all directions in this hybrid strategy roguelite deck builder. On your journey through varied grid-based biomes, battle unique foes and make tough moral choices to restore a corrupted land and decide the fate of your world.

name: Dark Auction
summary: The game is a mystery adventure centering on the idea of a historical figure having surreptitiously bequeathed a fictitious estate, following the drama that plays out among the characters faced with an enigma extending all the way into their modern world.

name: The Midnight Walkers
summary: Fight, Scavenge, and Extract in The Midnight Walkers, a hardcore FPS game with deadly zombies, dangerous players, and valuable loot. Craft weapons, armor, and consumables; trade items; and maintain your hideout. Escape Liberty Grand Center mega complex, and thrive...or die and lose everything.

name: 5omeday
summary: You have been assigned to guard a dragon girl set to be executed at the end of 5 days and have the ability to kill her instantly at any time with the push of a button in this multi-ending visual novel.

name: Disgaea Mayhem
summary:
Disgaea Mayhem is a brand-new 3D action RPG from an all-star team consisting of director Shunsuke Minowa, character designer Takehito Harada, and composer Tenpei Sato.

In this game, players will be able to experience the exhilaration of defeating enemies with overwhelming power that defies convention—unleashing flashy techniques with simple controls, completionist elements like leveling characters up to 9,999 and “reincarnating” them to grow even stronger, and developing overpowered stats that let them deal over a billion damage.

name: Space Warlord Baby Trading Simulator
summary: Buy low, sell high, and short an entire universe of babies in this arcade stock market sim set in the world of Space Warlord Organ Trading Simulator.

name: Folklore Hunter
summary: You are a hunter world reknowned for slaying supernatural beasts. Your next contract is to hunt down a wendigo plaguing a section of woods in north america. Gather resources, set traps, prepare your equipment, use your hunters instincts and take down the beast, before it hunts you.

name: The Red Pearls of Borneo
summary:
The Red Pearls of Borneo is a detective mystery deduction game inspired by Type Help, Return of the Obra Dinn and The Case of the Golden Idol.

You are a clairvoyant investigator in 1948 London, exploring the psychic echoes of a tragedy that occurred eight years prior on a remote plantation in Borneo.

name: Kuky Adventure
summary: Help Kuky, a curious character who gets lost in the Candy World and must travel through colorful environments to find the way back home. Along the journey, collect candies and face strange sugar-made enemies such as marshmallows, cookies, and other living, dangerous sweets.

name: Starsand Island
summary: Leave the hustle of the city behind and embrace life on Starsand Island. Fish, farm, raise animals, and befriend or fall in love with locals to learn their secrets. Customize your world with our DIY system, and invite friends to help build your dream paradise!

name: Pure Pool Pro
summary: Welcome to Pure Pool Pro; the ultimate pool simulation. Play solo or online, master every game type, and compete in high-stakes tournaments in immersive venues. Experience breathtaking 8K native visuals, lifelike physics, and pinpoint-precise controls.

name: Final Payload
summary: Final Payload is a fast-paced 2D action game where you control a guided warhead. Manage inertia and fuel, destroy enemies, avoid guarded zones, and land precisely to complete missions.

name: High on Life 2
summary: An intergalactic conspiracy threatens the fate of humanity! Team up with a wide cast of talking alien guns as you shoot, stab, and skate your way through the exotic locales to take down the bad guys and save your favorite species (humans)!

name: RD Racing
summary:
RD Racing is a casual combat racing game where speed and firepower decide who survives. Compete in intense top-down races, destroy rival drivers, earn cash, and upgrade your vehicle to dominate the competition.

Inspired by the classic Death Rally game, the game brings back the thrill of arcade vehicular combat — but with a modern twist and colorful 3D cartoon-style graphics. Fast races, explosive weapons, and strategic upgrades create a chaotic and addictive gameplay loop.

Win races. Eliminate opponents. Build the ultimate combat machine.

name: Norse: Oath of Blood
summary:
Norse is a turn-based tactics and combat game for PC and console. Set against the rich backdrop of the Viking Age, join Gunnar, a young warrior, on a relentless quest for revenge across the rugged landscapes of Norway.

Build a thriving settlement, govern your community, forge alliances, grow strong, and win the favour of the gods. For this is a time when legends are forged in the fires of conflict, and only the brave are remembered.

Written by prize-winning and Sunday Times bestselling author Giles Kristian, Norse is set in a fully realised historical world, driven by a compelling narrative and brimming with memorable characters.

name: Fur Squadron Phoenix
summary: Embark on an action-packed adventure in this on-rails space shooter. As a trainee pilot, you will fight in strange virtual worlds. Master your ship, upgrade your skills and protect the federation from an imminent threat. Are you up for the challenge?

name: Harvest Cafe
summary: Explore, grow, repair and cook delicious food! Harvest Cafe combines an open-world adventure with a restaurant business simulation, giving you the opportunity to enjoy farm life.

name: Demon Tides
summary: Explore the open seas and uncover the kingdom's dark secrets as you expressively platform your way across dozens of locales, upgrading your gear every step of the way!

name: Manairons
summary: Manairons is a 3D action platformer game inspired by the legends of little creatures living in the Pyrenees. Help Nai face off against the landowner who has taken control of a charming village using the power of the "canut," with magic, flute, and plenty of chaos.

name: Gear.Club Unlimited 3
summary: The Gear.Club series is back! Customize and set up your favourite cars to race at top speed along the roads of the French Mediterranean coast and Japan. Don't just win – show off your style!

name: Ultrapool
summary: The pool bar is always open! Ultrapool is a colorful roguelike about playing pool with a bunch of wacky balls with crazy effects. Carefully craft a perfect build and get the craziest trickshots!

name: Fixer Undercover
summary: Welcome to DIY Espionage - a VR puzzle adventure where everyday tools and found objects become your problem-solving kit. Go undercover as a repair worker inside a prison, investigate a mysterious rehabilitation program through various challenges, and make your escape with the truth.

name: The Legend of Khiimori
summary: The Legend of Khiimori is a system-driven game where you explore the untamed land of 13th century Mongolia as a brave courier rider. Breed and train horses with specialized abilities to explore every aspect of this diverse and fascinating landscape.

name: Homura Hime
summary: "Homura Hime" is a third person action game, featuring Japanese anime visuals and intense 3D bullet curtain gameplay. Alongside Homurahime, fight against Demon Girls possessed by deviant "emotions", and get closer to discovering the truth of not only the fallen, but also your own veiled legacy.

name: iRacing Arcade
summary: Race across global licensed series and build your own racing team to secure your motorsport legacy in this third person arcade racer.

name: Fumpers 2: Dual Realms
summary: Fumpers 2 delivers a chaotic platforming experience that tests your reflexes and patience. Stay alert through physics-based gameplay, surprising obstacles, and challenging levels. Don’t fall. Don’t quit.

name: Rager
summary: Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of this melee combat rhythm game! Master weapon of your choice – sword, mace, claws, hammer, axe, your own fists and many more! Stunning visuals and spatial audio technology puts you right in heart of the action.

name: Mr. Sleepy Man
summary: In Mr. Sleepy Man, you play as a sleepy guy who's up way past his bedtime and out of control! Make a mess of everything you find and turn Bedtime Town against you! This sandbox adventure is filled with comical hijinks, outrageous characters, and platforming action!

name: Out of Sight: Stage Fright
summary: Uncover the story of a tormented Unseen, a spirit child who reaches out to Sophie for help with their final performance. Together with Teddy, they reveal new perspectives, a chilling history, and a need to overcome their greatest fears.

name: FixForce
summary: Leap, climb, and launch your friends in this chaotic co-op extraction platformer for up to 6 players! Use your drill-wrench to build your way across a vibrant post-apocalyptic world, find replacement parts, and fix broken machines. And if you lose your head, don’t worry: it’s all part of the job.

name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
summary: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin is an open-world action RPG set in the universe of The Seven Deadly Sins. Step into the role of Prince Tristan of Liones and explore an open-world Britannia, as you embark on a journey to restore order to a world thrown into chaos by the collision of time and space.

name: No Vacation for an Executioner
summary: It's a a Dark Fantasy Action-RPG about a frustrated executioner in late 17th century. He ran away from the gallows. It aroused a riot of monsters, he had to clean up this cruel mess, and find out the truth of this crazy world.

name: Nothing Beyond This Point
summary: In the Void, everyone is alone, and you're no exception. Use your health as damage, create your own character with abilities and Sigils, and fight through corrupted souls in this top-down action Metroidvania. Don't be fooled - you're nobody's last hope.

name: Pakinpaks
summary: A cozy puzzle game where you go on a journey all around the world packing and organizing all sorts of travel gear. Fulfill your client's request in any way you wish and — as long as everything fits — prepare the neatest bags that you can!

name: Journey of the Garden Rose
summary: Lily must explore a fantastic palace and contest with the machinations of a cruel prince to rescue her mother in this Old-School 3D Action-Adventure game!

name: To Be a Millionaire
summary: Ordinary people can also become millionaires. In the game, you can get money by transporting apples. Once you have accumulated a certain amount of money, you can own your own barbecue restaurant. From then on, becoming a millionaire is no longer a dream.

name: Violet Impetus
summary: Violet Impetus is a bullet-hell arcade melee 'em up set in a series of (lightly) procedurally-generated arenas. Drop into different biomes to rid the world of Æris—the demiurge, petrificate & fractured. Its other children just won't see things eye to eye.

name: Incremental Ragebait
summary: Incremental Ragebait is the journey of Demon Incrementus to ragebait god! Buy new weapons, unlock upgrades, and build a purgatory to automate the ragebaiting process.

name: Melody Friends
summary: Just drop in your favorite song—done! A cute rhythm game that auto-generates multiple difficulties. Play comfortably with any key and clear a song your way with five friends.

name: Detective 26
summary: DETECTIVE 26 is a relaxing, turn-based mystery board game for 5-minute investigations. Roll dice and traverse low-poly maps to gather clues. Use logic to unmask the Wanted before turns run out! Level up your rank, unlock new content, and master the art of being a true detective!

name: Stickman Physics Battle Arena
summary: Level up and unlock the ultimate weapons in a bloody physics playground! You must kill countless enemies to increase your stats and become the greatest warrior. Dual wield over 75 unique and fun weapons in 7 different modes across nearly 100 different levels with up to 2 players in co-op or VS.

name: Final Stand Waves
summary: Defend your tower against endless hordes of zombies in this 2D top-down game.

name: The Mystical Traveler
summary: Play as a mysterious green cube and rise from the depths of a ruined world. Master your jumps, survive traps, and purify a dying ecosystem in this 2D platformer.

name: Rank: Warmaster Bunker Buster
summary: Rank Warmaster: Bunker Buster meets tactical control with strategic execution, bringing RTS elements to this sci-fi, action tower defense. Acquire resources as you further secure your bunker strategically placing perimeters and defensive and offensive units.
